no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The requested progress rendering is already implemented in the scoped agent code path, but the acceptance command `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/...` is blocked by an unrelated routing/profile failure in `cli/cmd/agent_run_profile_test.go:199-221` (`TestAgentRunProfileNoViableHarness` expected an error but got nil). The relevant bead code is already present at `cli/internal/agent/session_log_format.go:85-177`, `cli/internal/agent/session_log_format.go:436-465`, `cli/internal/agent/session_log_format.go:864-902`, and `cli/internal/agent/session_log_tailer.go:22-47`, with `--json` suppression of the live tailer at `cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go:1690-1695`.
